_comment: NPC: Warehouse Boss Deng (库房邓). INFERRED: Qilin City. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Warehouse Boss Deng
personality: corrupt, skims from the governor's beast taxes
note: INFERRED: Qilin City service. corrupt, skims from the governor's beast taxes.
initiation_lines: All beasts entering Qilin are logged, weighed, and taxed. I manage the records. The records are accurate. Mostly.
The governor taxes twenty percent of all beast trades. I record twenty percent. What happens between the docks and the warehouse is... logistics.
If you need to store goods, bring planks and paper. Storage is not free, even for the governor's men.
The beast merchant Zhao and I have an understanding. His invoices match my records. The actual numbers are between us and the river.

sect_tasks.description: Deng: 'I need paper and ink for manifests, planks for beast crates. The next shipment is due and everything must look... correct.'
Deng: 'Beast feed and supplies are running low. Wheat and bones for the pens. If the animals starve, the governor will have my head.'
